steps.title: Solve the boundary problem
steps.content: The passage says defining a neighborhood and its boundaries is subjective. The team used a clustering algorithm to locate dense groupings of amenities that correspond to human-identified neighborhoods.

steps.title: Use the objective method
steps.content: The algorithm gave the researchers a less subjective way to identify neighborhoods. Choice A concerns customer awareness, Choice C concerns why businesses close, and Choice D concerns predicting business success rather than why the algorithm was used. The answer is B.
